sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75930" key="ou)ranoba/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐρᾰνο-βάμων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾱ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n75930.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">traversing heaven</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
